title: Data storage & dataset API modernization
description:
Modernize data storage and dataset access for scalable deep learning workflows.

Scope:
- Evaluate HDF5 alternatives or a more robust HDF5 schema (versioned, metadata-forward).
- Add DataContainer subset/random sampling APIs and explicit subset selection.
- Handle empty/partial files gracefully during reads and preprocessing.
- Standardize metadata fields and alignment checks across specs/projections/features.
- Add tests covering empty/missing inputs and subset sampling.

title: Medium-scale pilot (10–20 birds) ROI + training run
description: Execute Phase 2 of docs/birdsong_training_plan.md on a medium cohort (10–20 birds, stratified by regime): generate ROIs for the cohort, train 50–100 epochs, evaluate collapse/overfit, tune key hyperparams (e.g., kl_warmup/kl_beta, spec ranges), and write a short run report (docs/runs/<RUN_ID>.md) capturing config + results + follow-ups.
notes: Testing plan: generate a pilot manifest; run ROI generation; run training; confirm run metadata JSON is produced and basic metrics/logging look sane.

title: Latent robustness for coarse identity (augmentations + eval)
description: Ensure AVA latents capture coarse syllable identity by being robust to small acoustic variation (amplitude/noise/time/freq perturbations) and by providing a simple evaluation harness for invariance and retrieval.
notes:
Rationale: Topology over distance images assumes a distance geometry where same-syllable tokens form coherent low-distance regions even when acoustically different.

Scope:
- Define a small set of augmentations that reflect 'acoustically different but same identity'.
- Add an invariance evaluation script (original vs augmented windows, kNN retrieval within augmented sets).
- Optionally add a consistency loss during training to encourage invariance.

Testing plan:
- Unit tests for augmentation determinism (seeded).
- Short smoke test: invariance metrics run on tests/data/test.wav without NaNs.

title: Augmentation config schema for coarse-identity invariance
description: Add a config section for spectrogram augmentations used to enforce coarse identity invariance (train-time) and to drive invariance evaluation.
notes:
Requirements:
- Default is OFF (no behavior change).
- YAML round-trip via FixedWindowExperimentConfig.
- Includes amplitude/noise/time/freq perturbations + SpecAugment-style masks (time/freq).
- Includes seed handling for deterministic runs when desired.

title: Implement deterministic spectrogram augmentations
description: Implement the augmentation operators needed for coarse identity invariance, with deterministic/seeded behavior for testing and reproducibility.
notes:
Scope (initial):
- amplitude jitter (gain)
- additive noise (SNR range)
- time shift/crop within fixed window
- freq shift (small bin offsets) OR freq warping-lite
- time mask + freq mask (SpecAugment style)

Implementation notes:
- Torch-only transforms operating on [H,W] or [B,H,W] spectrogram tensors.
- Accept a RNG/seed so unit tests can be deterministic.
- Keep transforms independent from dataset code so they can be reused for eval scripts.

title: Wire augmentations into fixed-window dataloaders (optionally two-view)
description: Apply the new spectrogram augmentations during training (and optionally emit paired augmented views) without breaking existing callers.
notes:
Requirements:
- Train-only by default; evaluation can opt-in.
- Preserve backwards-compatible batch formats unless an explicit flag is set.
- Support returning {x, x_aug} (or a tuple) for consistency losses / invariance eval.
- Ensure worker seeding is correct for multi-worker DataLoaders.

title: CLI: evaluate latent invariance + self-retrieval
description: Add a simple evaluation harness for coarse-identity invariance: compare latents for original vs augmented windows and compute self-retrieval metrics.
notes:
Output metrics (initial):
- mean/median ||mu(x)-mu(aug(x))|| and cosine similarity
- separation: dist(pos) vs dist(neg) within batch
- top-k self-retrieval accuracy where positives are augmented views
- optional stratification by augmentation type

Inputs:
- trained checkpoint
- either: manifest-driven window sampling OR direct wav + ROI file

Outputs:
- JSON + CSV summary; no plots required initially.

title: Training: optional invariance consistency loss on mu
description: Add an optional consistency term that encourages mu(x) ≈ mu(aug(x)) to make the latent geometry topology-friendly.
notes:
Notes:
- Keep the base ELBO objective unchanged when weight=0.
- Start with simple MSE or cosine loss on posterior means mu; optionally stop-grad one side.
- Provide a warmup schedule for the consistency weight to avoid early collapse.
- Log invariance stats during training.

title: Add tests + docs for latent invariance workflow
description: Add unit tests and short docs that validate and explain the invariance pipeline.
notes:
Tests:
- augmentation determinism under fixed seed
- invariance CLI runs on tests/data/test.wav without NaNs

Docs:
- what metrics mean, how to interpret for topology readiness
- recommended baseline augmentation config for birdsong

title: Learned observation scale (sigma/precision)
description: Make the reconstruction likelihood scale learnable (e.g., a learned log_sigma or precision) to reduce manual tuning of model_precision and improve calibrated ELBO terms.
notes:
Scope: implement a learned global observation scale (optionally per-frequency later) and update loss computation in src/ava/models/vae.py and src/ava/models/lightning_vae.py to keep the ELBO formulation consistent. Expose in fixed-window config.
Testing plan: verify gradients flow to the scale parameter; confirm training remains stable and metrics are finite on a small fixture.

title: Implement learned observation scale parameter
description: Add a learnable observation scale/precision parameterization to the VAE likelihood (Gaussian p(x|z)).
notes:
Scope: add a learned global log_sigma or log_precision with positivity constraint; keep fixed model_precision behavior as a fallback.
Testing plan: verify gradients flow to scale param and losses remain finite.

notes: Testing plan: run a tiny training smoke test; ensure metrics are finite and scale is logged.

title: Residual blocks for ConvVAE encoder/decoder
description: Introduce ResNet-style residual blocks in the spectrogram ConvVAE (encoder + decoder) to improve optimization and representation quality while keeping the model simple and shape-agnostic.
notes:
Scope: refactor conv stacks in src/ava/models/vae.py to use residual blocks (Conv-Norm-Act + skip). Keep output shape identical for arbitrary input_shape. Expose a config switch so the legacy plain-block architecture can still be used.
Testing plan: existing pytest suite; add a small forward/backward smoke test that checks reconstruction shape matches input for a couple of input_shape values.

notes:

Testing plan: unit test forward/backward + shape invariants.

title: Latent sequence export API (for topology / temporal analysis)
description: Add a supported way to encode long audio into time-indexed latent sequences (mu/sigma) suitable for downstream temporal-structure pipelines (e.g., distance-image + persistence in juvenile_learning_tda).
notes:
Scope:
- Export per-window latent stats over time for a clip (mu, logvar/sigma), with timestamps/window start times.
- Optionally export per-window energy/gating weights.
- Include run/model provenance (checkpoint path, git commit, config hash) when available.
- Provide both a python API and a CLI script.

Testing plan:
- Unit test: export on tests/data/test.wav produces expected shapes and monotonic timestamps.
- Integration sanity: compute a distance image between two exported sequences without NaNs.

title: Define latent-sequence output schema + file format
description: Specify the canonical latent-sequence export format (fields, shapes, dtypes) and choose output container(s) (e.g., NPZ + JSON sidecar, Parquet).
notes: Include: start_times_sec, window_length_sec, hop_length_sec, mu, logvar/sigma, optional energy weights; plus provenance metadata.

title: Python API: encode_clip_to_latent_sequence
description: Implement a python API to encode a single clip into a latent sequence using an AVA checkpoint and preprocessing config.
notes: Scope: handle resampling, spectrogram params, sliding windowing; support batching; support CPU/GPU.

title: CLI: export_latent_sequences.py (manifest-driven)
description: Add a CLI script to export latent sequences for many clips from a manifest (CSV/Parquet) with configurable output dir and sharding.
notes: Support resume/skip, progress reporting, and deterministic ordering.

title: Optional: export gating weights / energy per window

notes: Keep optional/off by default.

description: Add unit/integration tests for latent sequence export (shape invariants, monotonic timestamps, no NaNs).

title: Docs: temporal export + juvenile_learning_tda handoff

title: ROI coverage report (per bird/regime)
description: Add a report step after ROI generation that summarizes ROI coverage across the cohort/full dataset (counts and durations of segments per leaf audio dir; aggregate by bird_id/regime/dph/session) and flags missing/empty ROI outputs. Produce a machine-readable artifact (CSV/Parquet/JSON) plus a short markdown summary.
notes: Testing plan: run on a small subset; verify it flags missing ROI files and produces sane aggregated counts.

title: Upsample+conv decoder (remove ConvTranspose2d)
description: Replace the transposed-convolution decoder with upsample+conv blocks to reduce checkerboard artifacts and simplify shape handling for spectrogram reconstructions.
notes:
Scope: update the decoder path in src/ava/models/vae.py (and any Lightning wrappers if needed). Prefer interpolation upsampling + Conv2d (with GroupNorm/SiLU) over ConvTranspose2d. Preserve existing checkpoints only if cheap; otherwise provide a clear migration path.
Testing plan: ensure output shape matches input for multiple input_shape values; run a short training smoke test to verify stability.

title: Implement upsample+conv decoder path
description: Add a decoder implementation based on interpolation upsampling + Conv2d blocks (no ConvTranspose2d) in src/ava/models/vae.py.
notes:
Scope: design for arbitrary input_shape, including odd sizes; keep output exactly matching input.
Testing plan: shape tests for multiple input shapes; short training smoke test.
